title: MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: WFMC HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health services, including individual, group, family, and adolescent/youth counseling. Mental health providers specialize in helping patients who suffer from trauma, post-partum depression, substance abuse, developmental delays, and personality disorders. Services are integrated with primary care providers to best support the patient's behavioral health needs. 435 Lancaster Drive NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-7pm Email (503) 585-6388 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 585-6388 Main phone (503) 585-0669 FAX Main phone (503) 585-6388 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Most insurance plans accepted, including DMAP/Open Card, Willamette Valley Community Health (OHP CCO), and private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: None required; relevant medical documents, if available LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Traveling east on Center Street, turn right on Lancaster Drive. Traveling east on State Street, turn left on Lancaster Drive. Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Integrated Physical/Mental Health Services Perinatal Mood and Anxiety Disorders Treatment Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - WILLAMETTE FAMILY MEDICAL CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WFMC HEALTH
